title: Telemarketers
description: Solicit donations or orders for goods or services over the telephone.

tasks.text: Contact businesses or private individuals by telephone to solicit sales for goods or services, or to request donations for charitable causes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain customer information such as name, address, and payment method, and enter orders into computers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain products or services and prices, and answer questions from customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record names, addresses, purchases, and reactions of prospects contacted.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Maintain records of contacts, accounts, and orders.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Answer telephone calls from potential customers who have been solicited through advertisements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Deliver prepared sales talks, reading from scripts that describe products or services, to persuade potential customers to purchase a product or service or to make a donation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Telephone or write letters to respond to correspondence from customers or to follow up initial sales contacts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust sales scripts to better target the needs and interests of specific individuals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain names and telephone numbers of potential customers from sources such as telephone directories, magazine reply cards, and lists purchased from other organizations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule appointments for sales representatives to meet with prospective customers or for customers to attend sales presentations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct client or market surveys to obtain information about potential customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
